title: Bjork Horse
description: Makes all horses WISE and gives them ability of TOTAL AND ABSOLUTE AGREEMENT
body:
Fabric API + Forge are supported

Mod versions available: 1.19.2, 1.20.1, 1.21.1

Only one gif can describe this mod:

![My honest reaction](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcab1bf4529dc37e1bb2d1d751bffcf20eb41e7f.gif)

This mod makes all horses in your world to express their agreeing about your the worst decisions. Be careful on listening to them.

![mod showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f9937c2b332b7a93b964794b1b72cc02202f6e2.gif)

You can redistribute it anywhere, add in your modpacks and contribute following Apache 2.0 License.

Developed by Kitoglav

2025


If you have any questions - you can PM me or write in discord (Kitoglav)
